verbatim_quote: You need a market that's going to be big in ten years. Most investors are obsessed with the market size today, and they don't think at all about how the market is going to evolve.
gloss: [PREDICTION] You need a market that's going to be big in ten years. Most investors are obsessed with the market size today, and they don't think at all about how the market is going to evolve.
